description_text: Visit Our Store Click to enlarge ➔ DESCRIPTION Description: Fitment : Fits 2015-2018 BMW F80 M3 All Models Fits 2015-2019 BMW F82 F83 M4 All Models Wiring Work Is Required For LED Light Package Includes: Package Includes : 1 x Carbon Fiber Rear Bumper LED Diffuser Replacement W/ Corner Extension As Shown In the Picture Feature: 100% Brand New & Never Been Used. Real Carbon Fiber V Style Rear Bumper LED Diffuser With Corner Extensions For BMW M3/M4. This Diffuser Kit Features An Re-designed Big Aggressive Aerodynamic Vortex Shark Fins With New F1 Style LED Strobe Brake Lights. Excellent Fitment And Quality. The Middle Diffuser is Direct Clip-on Installation With the Well-Constructed Tab. The Two Corner Extensions Are Added To The Sides By Self-Tapping Screws. Please Note That There Is Wiring Work Such As Spicing and Connecting Required For LED Lights. Made Of Super Lightweight And Durable Real Carbon Fiber Material. Quality 3K Weave Pattern Carbon Fiber Cover With Hard UV-Protected Coating. This Kit Not Only Improves Appearance and Aerodynamic, But Also Improves Safety By Adding More Visibility To The Rear End. *Instruction Not Included. Removing the Rear Bumper For Installation is Recommended to Properly Fit the Diffuser. Drilling is Required For Installation. Wiring Work Such As Connecting and Spicing is Also Required For The Brake Light. Professional Installation Is Highly Recommended.* PAYMENT Payment We Accept Payment Via Paypal Only Pleaes Pay For The Item Within 3 Days After The Bidding Or Purchase. E-Check Payments Requires 2-4 Business Days To Clear Before We Can Process The Order. Unpaid Item Will Lead To Ebay Unpaid Strike Case. RETURN POLICY SHIPPING Shipping To Check The Most Accurate Shipping Rate, Please Refer The Ebay Shipping and Payment Tab On the Left Hand Side. All our items are stored at and being shipped from our location in City of Industry, California USA. All Shipments are made From Monday to Friday During Business Hours except weekends and major USA Holiday. Most of The Order Received Before 12 PM Pacific Time Will Be Shipped Out On The Same Business Day. Combine Shipping Discount is Available. Please Contact us For Detail. We Ship Worldwide. We are not responsbile for any import duty. However, We can make arrangement to help reduce the import duty. Please Contact US If You Have Any Questions.
